name: Normative Carbon Accounting and Scope 3 Emissions API
what_it_does: Normative carbon accounting and Scope 3 emissions REST API for sustainability teams, finance departments, and ESG platforms to calculate business carbon footprints using spend-based methodology, access emissions factors for spend categories, and generate GHGP-compliant GHG inventories — enabling automated Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions calculation from financial transaction data through Normative's science-based carbon accounting platform. Enables AI agents to manage emission calculation for spend-based carbon footprint automation, handle spend category for MRIO emission factor automation, access GHG inventory for corporate carbon reporting automation, retrieve Scope 3 category for value chain emissions automation, manage accounting period for annual reporting automation, handle emission factor for EXIOBASE database automation, access supplier data for primary data integration automation, retrieve benchmark for sector comparison automation, manage reduction target for science-based target automation, and integrate Normative with ERP, accounting, and ESG reporting platforms for automated carbon accounting.
use_cases: Calculating Scope 3 carbon emissions from financial transaction data using spend-based methodology automation agents
Generating GHGP-compliant GHG inventories from accounting system spend data for ESG reporting automation agents
Accessing EXIOBASE emission factors for spend category mapping in corporate carbon accounting automation agents
Integrating Normative with ERP systems for automated corporate carbon footprint calculation automation agents
not_for: Real-time grid carbon intensity for computing (Electricity Maps and WattTime are better for operational carbon)
Individual product lifecycle assessment (SimaPro is specialized for product LCA)
Carbon credit trading and offset markets (Normative is accounting/measurement, not trading)
best_when: A sustainability team, finance department, or ESG reporting platform wanting AI agents to calculate corporate Scope 3 emissions from spend data using EXIOBASE emission factors and generate GHGP-compliant carbon inventories through Normative's accounting platform.
avoid_when: SPEND-BASED METHODOLOGY HAS LIMITATIONS: Normative uses spend-based Scope 3 calculation (financial spend mapped to emission factors); automated primary-data accuracy assumption creates overestimation vs spend-based proxy; automated must communicate spend-based methodology limitations in reporting. EXIOBASE FACTORS ARE REGIONAL: EXIOBASE emission factors are region-specific (different factors for US vs EU vs Asia spend); automated global uniform emission factor assumption creates geographic methodology error; automated must specify correct country/region for each spend transaction. ENTERPRISE SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED: Normative API requires Enterprise subscription; automated free-tier API assumption creates no access; automated must have Enterprise contract for API integration. ACCOUNTING SYSTEM DATA QUALITY MATTERS: Normative carbon calculation quality depends on spend data granularity; automated high-level spend category assumption creates low-accuracy emission estimates; automated must map spend to Normative's category taxonomy for meaningful carbon data.

auth.notes: Normative uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Stockholm, Sweden HQ. Founded 2017 by Kristian Ravn Hansen, Eirik Thune, and Therese Möllevinge. Products: Carbon accounting (Scope 1/2/3), spend-based emissions, EXIOBASE emission factors, GHG inventory, science-based targets, supplier engagement. SDKs: None public. GHGP, GRI, TCFD compliant methodology. CSRD-ready. Raised €7M (2021). Competes with Plan A and Watershed for corporate carbon accounting.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo available; production requires Enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise pricing based on company size and reporting requirements; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Stockholm SE. Enterprise for API. GHGP methodology. EXIOBASE emission factors. CSRD-ready.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; emissions calculation APIs throttled per contract

known_agent_gotchas: SPEND-BASED METHODOLOGY PRODUCES ESTIMATES: Normative spend-based Scope 3 uses EXIOBASE factors mapped to financial spend; automated primary-data accuracy expectation creates unrealistic precision; automated must communicate spend-based methodology limitations and use primary data where available

GEOGRAPHIC SPECIFICITY FOR EMISSION FACTORS: EXIOBASE emission factors vary significantly by country/region of economic activity; automated geography-agnostic emission calculation creates systematic error; automated must specify transaction origin country for accurate factor selection

SPEND TAXONOMY MAPPING REQUIRED: Normative requires spend mapped to its category taxonomy; automated raw transaction data input assumption creates unmapped_category error; automated must implement spend category mapping from accounting system categories to Normative taxonomy

ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: Normative API requires Enterprise subscription; automated self-service API access assumption creates no public endpoint; automated must obtain Enterprise contract before development

REPORTING PERIOD IS ANNUAL: Carbon accounting is typically annual reporting period; automated sub-annual data updates assumption creates methodology inconsistency; automated must align data ingestion with annual accounting period boundaries
agent_readiness.security_notes: Carbon accounting platform. GDPR, GHGP. OAuth2. EU/SE. Corporate spend and emissions data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Carbon accounting. GDPR, GHGP. OAuth2. EU/SE. Corporate spend and emissions data.
